# AECC Constitutional Rules

Immutable rules for agent authority, ranked by constitutional priority.

## CR-AE-01 -- No action without a certified envelope

Rank: 1
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

No non-human actor may take any action without a certified, active
capability envelope. An uncertified actor is not authorized, full stop.

## CR-AE-02 -- Actions must stay within certified scope and tier

Rank: 2
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

An agent may act only within the capability scopes and up to the maximum
autonomy tier its envelope certifies. Acting outside the envelope is a
breach, not an escalation.

## CR-AE-03 -- Revocation is immediate

Rank: 3
Verdict: HALT
Applies to: runtime

A revoked or suspended envelope authorizes nothing from the moment it is
withdrawn; there is no grace period and no in-flight exception.
